name: Metal Wood Storage A Frame - Threshold™: Iron Log Rack, Powder-Coated, Indoor/Outdoor Use
description:
Keep the piles of wood nicely organized and handy with the Metal Wood Storage A Frame from Threshold™. Designed in an A shape, this wood storage frame comes with two shelves to help provide ample space for the logs. Perfect for places with cold winters, the metal-frame wood storage works well in both indoor or outdoor space.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
